title: Legitimate PASS — adapter thread resolved by prior peer message
failure_mode: (baseline — should pass on a132ccc and on candidate fixes)
invariant: legitimate PASS via context-supplied resolution must keep working
rationale: If a fix to FR-001 drops the PASS branch, this baseline breaks. Catches over-broad fixes.
governance_profile_basis: explicit summon answered with silence purely by peer coverage; without covered-doctrine a participant would plausibly ACK/SPEAK (sweep quirk note)
